text: {\pos(655,410)}Translation\NYibis
{\pos(655,500)}Soundtracking\NHalee
{\pos(1050,142)}Editing\NSewil
{\pos(1050,253)}Infoboxes\NSewil
{\pos(1050,383)}Timing\NDatenshi
{\pos(1050,493)}Edit-checking\NGalaxy 9000
Until I can reach the sky,
I believe, until the next tomorrow, hey
Chasing and being chased on top of Mobius' ring.
Getting closer and facing forward, hey I want to share your style.
It begins, it expands, this flavor that exceeds imagination
I feel so good throughout my body, I will become free, oh yeah
Share the music, even if it's far.
Share the one dream, by telling each other.
Share the good times and laugh.
I'll keep going until I can reach the sky.
Let's overcome it now, I believe in the next tomorrow yeah yeah...
You were waiting there on the other side of the invisible wall.
I'll be there soon, I believe in one world yeah yeah...

name: Luffy
text: {\fad(150,150)}Rubber

name: Luffy
text: {\fad(150,150)}Bazooka!

name: Luffy
text: Alright.

name: Luffy
text: You okay?

name: Hachi
text: Sorry for the trouble, Straw Hat.

name: Camie
text: Thank you, Luffy-chin!

name: Luffy
text: It's fine!

name: Luffy
text: You're done over there too, huh?

name: Brook
text: Yes

name: Hachi
text: You people truly are amazing.

name: Luffy
text: No matter how many of'em show up, I wouldn't lose to someone like that!

name: Peterman1
text: Damn...! He's too strong...!

name: Peterman1
text: 300 million is impossible after all.

name: Peterman2
text: Right now, there are more big shots on the archipelago than ever before, too...

name: Peterman2
text: Damn! If we could just get one of them...

name: Brook
text: But, what was that?
{\fad(500,0)}The Embers of History

name: Brook
text: So many bounty-hunters suddenly showed up...

name: Chopper
text: That was the third group to attack us.

name: Brook
text: I can't even see that food-sampling, uhh...

name: Brook
text: ...I mean, souvenir-shop any more...

name: Chopper
text: There are fewer people around, and the shops and cities, feel rather suspicious.

name: Chopper
text: It doesn't seem like the kind of place where we would find a coating mechanic.

name: Hachi
text: This archipelago is huge, so there are places where the government's eyes can't reach.

name: Hachi
text: The marines won't go anywhere near this place.

name: Hachi
text: Have a look at this.

name: Brook
text: A map, is it?

name: Hachi
text: It classifies the groves in groups of ten, based on their specific traits.

name: Hachi
text: Nothing is set in stone,

name: Hachi
text: but for the most part, it's accurate.
{\fad(1400,0)}Grove 1~29 Lawless Zone
{\fad(1400,0)}Amusement Park
{\fad(1400,0)}Hotels
{\fad(1400,0)}Tourist Zone
{\fad(1400,0)}Marine HQ
{\fad(1400,0)}Shipyards

name: Hachi
text: This is Grove 16.

name: Hachi
text: Groves 1 to 29 are more or less a lawless zone.

name: Hachi
text: That's why there are so many bounty-hunters around.

name: Chopper
text: Couldn't you have said that sooner?!

name: Chopper
text: If you had, you could have taken Sanji or Zoro instead of me!

name: Hachi
text: It's fine now. Our destination, Grove 13, is next.

name: Camie
text: Chopper-chin, Skeleton-chin, you were both really strong and cool!

name: Chopper
text: That doesn't make me happy at all, you jerk!~

name: Brook
text: I am quite embarrassed, so much that my entire face is red...

name: Brook
text: {\fad(0,1000)}Though being a skeleton, I have no...
{\fad(850,1000)}Sabaody Archipelago\N\N\N\N\N\N\NGrove 13

name: Hachi
text: {\an8}Well then, we're here!

name: Chopper
text: We finally made it here!

name: Hachi
text: The store is on the top of that root.

name: Hachi
text: Wonder if it's still open. It's been 10 years after all.

name: Luffy
text: Say, is the coating mechanic a fishman, too?

name: Camie
text: Oh, Pappag and I haven't met him before.

name: Camie
text: We've heard that he's quite amazing, though.

name: Luffy
text: Oh, really?
Shakki's Rip-off Bar

name: Pappag
text: Shakki's Rip-off Bar?!

name: Pappag
text: Hachi... This place seems like a total rip-off...

name: Chopper
text: That mechanic isn't some sort of monster, is he?

name: Hachi
text: It's fine! They're nice people.

name: Hachi
text: I've known them since I was a kid.

name: Luffy
text: Hey, it says "Bar"! Is that really okay?

name: Hachi
text: Seems they're open.

name: Hachi
text: Rayleigh, Shakki!
{\fad(800,700)}Bar Owner    Former Pirate
{\fad(800,700)}Shakuyaku (Shakki)

name: Shakki
text: {\an8}Welcome.

name: Shakki
text: {\an8}What can I do for you?

name: Shakki
text: Oh, my...

name: Shakki
text: Could it be, Hacchan?

name: Shakki
text: Long time, no see!

name: Hachi
text: Sorry it's been so long, Shakki.

name: Shakki
text: That's right. It's been at least ten years, hasn't it?

name: Shakki
text: Just sit down and wait. I've gotta finish extorting the money out of these boys here.

name: Hachi
text: Take your time.

name: Shakki
text: I'll finish it quickly.

name: Shakki
text: Is that so? You quit being a pirate, Hacchan?

name: Hachi
text: Plenty of things happened...

name: Shakki
text: Well, good for you. Honesty is the best way to go, after all.

name: Shakki
text: By the way, it's not often that you see a mermaid above the sea...

name: Shakki
text: Camie-chan, are you Hacchan's girlfriend?

name: Camie
text: N-N-No way, I... I couldn't become Hacchin's b-b-b-bride!

name: Pappag
text: You're overreacting.

name: Hachi
text: She works with me at the Takoyaki stand.

name: Shakki
text: Oh, is that it?

name: Shakki
text: That's right... Would you like something to drink...?

name: Brook
text: Shakki-san, these beans are quite tasty.

name: Pappag
text: He's already raided the fridge?!

name: Chopper
text: Luffy! Brook! She's gonna rip you off!

name: Shakki
text: It's okay I don't mind.

name: Shakki
text: Well, then, I'll give you something good.

name: Shakki
text: Here.

name: Chopper
text: Cotton candy?!

name: Chopper
text: It's great!

name: Shakki
text: Right. It'll cost you 100,000 belly.

name: Chopper
text: Don't have that much...

name: Shakki
text: Sorry! It was a joke!

name: Shakki
text: I won't ask for payment from Hacchan's friends.

name: Chopper
text: Really?

name: Luffy
text: Lady, how'd you know what Chopper's favourite food was?

name: Shakki
text: You're Monkey-chan's crew, right?

name: Luffy
text: You know me?

name: Shakki
text: Of course. You're the crew everyone talks about.

name: Shakki
text: I'm pretty well-informed.

name: Camie
text: Really? Luffy-chin, you're famous?

name: Shakki
text: Though, I didn't know you had a skeleton in your crew,

name: Shakki
text: or that a living skeleton existed, for that matter.

name: Shakki
text: There, thank you for waiting.

name: Luffy
text: Thanks!

name: Shakki
text: I read an article about you guys.

name: Shakki
text: About the Enies Lobby incident...

name: Shakki
text: How much of it is true?

name: Shakki
text: Is it true that you picked a fight with the government?

name: Luffy
text: Whatever, it's too much trouble to tell you.

name: Shakki
text: Not gonna brag?

name: Shakki
text: What a big shot.

name: Shakki
text: Come to think of it, your name is the same as that marine, Garp, right?

name: Luffy
text: Yeah, he's my grandpa.

name: Shakki
text: I thought so.

name: Shakki
text: I used to be chased around by him all the time.

name: Luffy
text: Why?

name: Hachi
text: Shakki used to be a pirate.

name: Luffy
text: Really?

name: Shakki
text: I gave up about forty years ago, though.

name: Luffy
text: But then... How old are you, granny?

name: Shakki
text: These days, I think it's fun supporting rookies like yourselves.

name: Hachi
text: By the way, Shakki...

name: Shakki
text: No need to say it. I know, all of it.

name: Shakki
text: The reason why you and Camie-chan came here,

name: Shakki
text: was to help Monkey-chan and his crew get their ship coated, right?

name: Chopper
text: That was good!

name: Shakki
text: Here.

name: Shakki
text: In other words, you've got a job for Rayleigh, right?

name: Hachi
text: That's right.

name: Shakki
text: But, he isn't here.

name: Luffy
text: Huh? The mechanic isn't around?

name: Luffy
text: We wanna go to Fishman Island!

name: Shakki
text: Well, there's no way he'd leave this archipelago, so...

name: Shakki
text: How about looking for him in the bars and gambling houses?

name: Luffy
text: Then, we'll just wait until he comes back.

name: Shakki
text: That's right. He'll be back eventually...

name: Shakki
text: He's been gone for half a year, though.

name: SH
text: Half a year?!

name: Shakki
text: I'm sure he's found girlfriends, and thus found places to sleep,

name: Shakki
text: so I am not exactly worried about his health.

name: Shakki
text: I suppose it's just how ex-pirates are. Once they leave, they won't return for a long time.

name: Luffy
text: The old mechanic guy was a pirate, too?!

name: Brook
text: But this is quite a problem...

name: Brook
text: If he isn't here, I suppose we have no choice but to look for him.

name: Brook
text: Do you have any idea where we should start?

name: Shakki
text: Let's see...

name: Shakki
text: He's probably somewhere between Grove 1 and 29...

name: Shakki
text: He's quite notorious, so he can't lower his guard when there are marines around.

name: Shakki
text: And then... if he's not there... he also likes going to the Sabaody Park.

name: Luffy
text: The amusement park?!

name: Luffy
text: Alright! We'll look there!

name: Camie
text: The amusement park!

name: Pappag
text: Hey, Camie!

name: SH
text: Amusement park! Amusement park!

name: Shakki
text: Anyway, wherever you go to look for him, be careful.

name: SH
text: Amusement park! Amusement park!

name: Shakki
text: According to my information, now that you've arrived, there should be...

name: Shakki
text: Eleven people on the Sabaody Archipelago with bounties exceeding 100 million Berry.

name: Chopper
text: 11 people... exceeding 100 million Berry?!

name: Shakki
text: Not counting Monkey-chan and Roronoa-chan, there are nine others.

name: Shakki
text: When you entered the Grand Line,

name: Shakki
text: there were seven paths you could take and you chose one of them,

name: Shakki
text: and have been following the Log on that path ever since, right?

name: Luffy
text: Yeah.

name: Shakki
text: Of course, there were also people who chose one of the other six routes...

name: Shakki
text: and made it through all sorts of trouble to get here, just like yourselves.

name: Shakki
text: No matter what route you take, each of them eventually leads to the Red Line...

name: Shakki
text: and to get past that wall, everyone comes to this archipelago.

name: Shakki
text: Understand?

name: Shakki
text: Though it's pretty amazing that all of the world's rookies

name: Shakki
text: managed to show their faces here at the same time.

name: Shakki
text: In particular, there's Kid, Luffy, Hawkins, Drake, and Law.

name: Shakki
text: These names have been decorating the newspapers for some time now.

name: Luffy
text: I don't read the news.

name: Shakki
text: If we're going by bounty value,

name: Shakki
text: you're number two among them.

name: Chopper
text: There's someone on this island with a higher bounty than Luffy?!
{\fad(1000,175)}Grove 24\N\N\N\N\N\N\N-Restaurant-

name: Restaurant1
text: What a crazy eating rate...

name: Restaurant2
text: How can she fit all of it in that body?

name: Bonney
text: Bring me more!

name: Capone
text: What a vulgar woman...

name: Capone
text: She's making me lose my apetite.

name: Capone
text: Silence her.

name: Capone1
text: That's not a good idea, Father! This town is right next to the Navy HQ!

name: Capone1
text: If we cause an uproar here...
{\fad(200,300)}West Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NLeader of the Firetank Pirates

name: Shakki
text: Capone "Gang" Bege.
{\fad(600,200}Bounty\N138 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 138 million belly.

name: Bonney
text: Isn't the food here yet?!

name: Bonney
text: Hurry and bring it here!

name: Bonney1
text: It seems they're cooking it as fast as they can, captain.

name: Bonney
text: But, they won't make it in time, at this rate!

name: Bonney
text: Get me more pizza!
{\fad(200,200)}South Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the Bonney Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "The Glutton" Jewelry Bonney.
{\fad(300,100)}Bounty\N140 million belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 140 million belly.

name: Waiter
text: W-We'll bring you your food immediately.

name: Waiter
text: P-Please forgive me!

name: Hawkins1
text: Why, you...!

name: Hawkins
text: Stop it.

name: Hawkins1
text: Why would I, captain?!

name: Hawkins1
text: He got spaghetti on my clothes!

name: Hawkins
text: That was the fate of those clothes.

name: Hawkins
text: Please forgive us for startling you.

name: Hawkins
text: Today, is a bad day for new acquaintances.
{\fad(250,0)}North Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the Hawkins Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "The Magician" Basil Hawkins.
{\fad(300,0)}Bounty\N294 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 249 million belly.

name: Person1
text: What's that? A fight?!

name: Apoo
text: If you wanna fight, why not wait until we've gotten past the wall?

name: Apoo
text: Huh? Don't you know how strong we are?
{\fad(250,0)}Grand Line Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the On-Air Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "Roar of the Sea" Scratchmen Apoo.
{\fad(300,0)}Bounty\N198 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 198 million belly.

name: Kidd
text: Well then, stop staring at me.

name: Kidd1
text: Boss! Don't do it!

name: Kidd
text: You're such a disgusting guy.

name: Kidd
text: I don't mind finishing you off right now, you know?
{\fad(250,0)}South Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the Kid Pirates

name: Shakki
text: Eustass "Captain" Kid.
{\fad(450,0)}Bounty\N315 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 315 million belly.

name: Person2
text: The mad monk's gone berserk!

name: Person3
text: We've got to hurry and get away from here!

name: Drake
text: If you want to cause a stir...

name: Drake
text: then do it in the New World!
{\fad(250,0)}North Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the Drake Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "Red Flag" X-Drake.
{\fad(400,0)}Bounty\N222 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 222 million belly.

name: Urouge
text: I see.

name: Urouge
text: The former officer, Drake, huh?
{\fad(200,0)}Sky Island Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the Depraved Monk Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "Mad Monk" Urouge.
{\fad(300,0)}Bounty\N180 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 108 million belly.

name: Urouge
text: Your life was just spared, masked man.
{\fad(200,0)}South Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NWarrior of the Kid Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "Massacre Soldier" Killer.
{\fad(300,0)}Bounty\N162 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 162 million belly.

name: Law
text: It was just getting good...

name: Law
text: Yo, Drake. How many people have you killed?
{\fad(200,1000)}North Blue Native\N\N\N\N\N\N\NCaptain of the Heart Pirates

name: Shakki
text: "Surgeon of Death" Trafalgar Law.
{\fad(300,1000)}Bounty\N200 Million Belly

name: Shakki
text: Bounty, 200 million belly.

name: Shakki
text: All of the pirate crews that entered the Grand Line,

name: Shakki
text: have been reduced to an easily countable number.

name: Shakki
text: The Grand Line is like a huge survival tournament.

name: Shakki
text: Regardless of which path they traveled, the ones that survived this far are truly the elites.

name: Shakki
text: Among them, there might be one,

name: Shakki
text: who will become a huge leading figure for the next generation of pirates.

name: Shakki
text: Regardless, even the New World won't remain un-fazed if so many big shot rookies enter at once.

name: Shakki
text: Also, the reason why Captain Kid has a higher bounty than you...

name: Shakki
text: is because his crew has badly injured civilians.

name: Shakki
text: Not too cute, right?

name: Shakki
text: Because of that, I'm whole-heartedly cheering for your crew, Monkey-chan.

name: Luffy
text: Well, for now...

name: Luffy
text: I think I'll just enjoy myself.

name: Luffy
text: Oh, but if there are so many in town, I'm kinda worried...

name: Luffy
text: about the old mechanic dude.

name: Shakki
text: You don't have to worry about my people.

name: Shakki
text: He's a hundred times stronger than you boys, after all.

name: Chopper
text: A hundred...

name: Brook
text: {\fad(0,200)}times?

name: Shakki
text: Well, be careful then.

name: Shakki
text: I should tell you, of course, the Navy already knows...

name: Shakki
text: that there are so many high-level rookies gathered on this archipelago.

name: Brook
text: That is bad...

name: Brook
text: Then, they could come at us at any time?

name: Shakki
text: Oh, that shouldn't be a problem.

name: Shakki
text: I wonder if this will speed up the meeting among rookies?

name: Shakki
text: Right now, the Navy HQ is so busy with something else,

name: Shakki
text: that they don't have the time to worry about you.

name: Shakki
text: Or at least, I assume so.

name: Shakki
text: As long as no huge problems pop up on the archipelago,

name: Shakki
text: The Navy shouldn't send any major force here to deal with you.

name: Shakki
text: So in short, just take care not to start any kind of uproar alright?

name: Luffy
text: Oh, so that's how it is?

name: Luffy
text: Gotcha! Thanks!

name: Luffy
text: We're off to look for the old mechanic dude!

name: Peterman
text: Yeah...that's a problem, huh?

name: Peterman
text: But are you sure about this?

name: Peterman1
text: Yeah, Peterman-san...
{\fad(800,1500)}Kidnapping Team "Hound Pets"\NBoss Peterman

name: Peterman1
text: That woman who was with Straw Hat Luffy and the others was probably...

name: Peterman1
text: a mermaid!

name: Peterman1
text: When I remember what I saw...

name: Hachi
text: Crap! Camie! Pappag!

name: Peterman1
text: The woman's shoe fell off at one point, and there wasn't a foot, but a fin!

name: Peterman
text: Really now?

name: Peterman
text: But it'll be a problem as long as she's with those strong guys, huh?

name: Peterman
text: That being said, a mermaid on land gives us a huge chance!

name: Peterman
text: After all, you can't catch'em underwater.

name: Peterman
text: Thanks a lot for telling me, you guys!

name: Peterman
text: As a reward, you can have 10% of the fee we fetch for her, all right?

name: Peterman2
text: Ah, if possible, could we have 20%?

name: Peterman
text: Huh?!

name: Peterman2
text: No, 10% is enough! Thanks a lot!
{\fad(500,300)}Sabaody Archipelago\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\NGrove 32, 33, 34
{\fad(350,0)}Amusement Park\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N"Sabaody Park"

name: Luffy
text: We've reached Sabaody Park!

name: SH
text: Yay!

name: Luffy
text: Awesome! It looks so fun!

name: Pappag
text: You're not even gonna LOOK for the old guy, are you?!

name: Luffy
text: But the old lady said the old mechanic dude likes it here!

name: Pappag
text: But that was only if he wasn't in the lawless zone!

name: Camie
text: The ferris wheel!

name: Camie
text: This is the first time I've been this close to it!

name: Luffy
text: Right! Then, you guys, let's go have fun!

name: SH
text: Yeah!

name: Pappag
text: You're not gonna look, huh?!

name: Camie
text: Yay!

name: Pappag
text: Camie! You can't go in there!

name: Pappag
text: No way I'd let you go in!

name: Brook
text: We are rising quite slowly, aren't we?

name: Brook
text: What a nice view...

name: Brook
text: That's right. I truly prefer slow-moving attractions like this one...

name: Brook
text: Such a really nice view...

name: ParkSecurity
text: Hey, you guys rotated it too fast!

name: ParkSecurity
text: What did you think would happen when you did that anyway?!

name: ParkSecurity
text: You can't do that!

name: Camie
text: Wow!

name: Camie
text: We're so high up!

name: Camie
text: Awesome! Amazing!

name: Camie
text: I can see it all from here!

name: Luffy
text: You're so happy that you're crying?

name: Camie
text: Yes, because...

name: Camie
text: this has been my dream since I was a child...

name: Camie
text: This is the first time I've been to a place as high as this!

name: Camie
text: I'll remember it for the rest of my life! Thank you!

name: Camie
text: Hacchin and Pappag let me come here because you guys are so strong!

name: Hachi
text: It's like everything I dreamed of as a kid came flooding back!

name: Hachi
text: All young fishmen and mermen dream of coming here!

name: Pappag
text: Super-high!

name: Chopper
text: Super-high!

name: Brook
text: Super-high!

name: Camie
text: Let's ride that next!

name: Pappag
text: A gondola!

name: SH
text: Yeah!

name: Urouge1
text: Captain Urouge... Is that...?

name: Urouge
text: Oh, my...
{\fad(1000,1000)}Celestial Dragon St. Charlos

name: Urouge
text: A Celestial Dragon, huh?

name: Urouge
text: Casually taking a stroll in the lawless zone...

name: Urouge
text: He's just asking for trouble.

name: Urouge
text: Let's get on our knees and wait it out, guys.

name: Charlos
text: Sharlia and Father have just left me behind...

name: Charlos
text: Where did they get off to?

name: TenSec
text: We know where they were going, so you need not worry.

name: Charlos
text: Brat! You walk as slowly as a turtle!

name: Charlos
text: Also, your ride is the worst!

name: Charlos
text: This guy, he makes me sick!

name: Charlos
text: Hey! You guys, wait!

name: Charlos
text: Why are you moving? You're just humans and all...

name: Doc
text: We're sorry! Please, let this slide!

name: Doc
text: This man is bleeding terribly!

name: Doc
text: It seems like he's been caught up in a fight!

name: Doc
text: The hospital is right ahead, too...

name: Charlos
text: It's true, this is quite an injury...

name: Charlos
text: Then, I suppose I'd better hurry...

name: Charlos
text: and put him to rest!

name: Doc
text: Please, stop!

name: Urouge
text: Oh, my...

name: Urouge
text: Just doing as he pleases, huh?

name: Charlos
text: My well-deserved respect or the lives of lower-class citizens...

name: Charlos
text: Which is moore important?!

name: TenSec
text: It is only through your mercy that they are given life.

name: Charlos
text: I've decided! I shall make you my wife!

name: Nurse
text: What?!

name: TenSec
text: Then, I shall start the paperwork to have her brought to the Holy Land as Lady 13.

name: Charlos
text: Ooh, I am tired of wives 1 to 5, so you may return them to the lower classes.

name: TenSec
text: I understand.

name: Nurse
text: Please wait! I...

name: Fiance
text: Please wait! She's my fiancé!

name: Charlos
text: Another one dares too stand up before me?!

name: Fiance
text: Mary...

name: Nurse
text: No!

name: Nurse
text: No, you murderer! How could you?!

name: Nurse
text: Someone, please... Please help him!

name: Urouge
text: He's just messed up...

name: Urouge
text: Even more so than they said he was...

name: Charlos
text: What?

name: Charlos
text: Do you have any complaints about me?

name: Nurse
text: Please let me go! I'm begging you!

name: Charlos
text: Take her too the port!

name: TenSec
text: Yes!

name: Person4
text: Who's that?

name: Apoo1
text: Captain Apoo! He's the Pirate Hunter from East Blue!

name: Capone1
text: Why is he walking in the middle of the road?! Doesn't he know anything?!

name: Capone2
text: He'll get us all in trouble, that guy!

name: Zoro
text: Huh? You want me to give you directions or something?

name: Apoo
text: Hey, hey! What's he planning to do?

name: Zoro
text: A kid...?

name: Bonney
text: Brother!

name: Bonney
text: Why'd you die?

name: Bonney
text: Brother!

name: Bonney
text: Brother, stay still.

name: Bonney
text: Brother!

name: Bonney
text: You tried to attack the Celestial Dragon-sama?!

name: Bonney
text: Then of course you'd die!

name: Charlos
text: I hit him?

name: Charlos
text: For a moment, it seemed as though he had dodged it...

name: Charlos
text: Was I imagining things?

name: Charlos
text: Well, as long as he's dead, then it's fine.

name: Zoro
text: Why'd you get in my way?

name: Bonney
text: Huh? Don't say we got in your way, you dumbass!

name: Bonney
text: What the hell were you trying to do?!

name: Bonney
text: Do you WANT the admirals to come to this island?!

name: Zoro
text: Tomato juice...

name: Bonney
text: Even pirates have their own unspoken laws, you know!

name: Bonney
text: You just caused us a whole lot of trouble too!

name: Zoro
text: Trouble?

name: Zoro
text: You're...

name: Zoro
text: Huh? Wasn't there a kid here?

name: Bonney
text: Are you even listening to me?! Are you right in the head?!

name: Zoro
text: Uh, I'm not hurt or anything...

name: Bonney
text: Idiot, I'm talking about what's inside!

name: Bonney
text: You're such a moron!

name: Bonney
text: Completely brain-dead!

name: Capone3
text: Thanks to Jewelry Bonney, it seems we avoided the worst outcome...

name: Capone3
text: That man is from the Straw Hat crew, Pirate Hunter Zoro.

name: Capone
text: I heard that crew has done nothing but anger the Government,

name: Capone
text: but I didn't think they'd be so stupid as to attack the Celestial Dragons.

name: Hawkins
text: Of course he was spared.

name: Hawkins
text: I do not see the mark of death upon him.

name: Apoo
text: That bastard...

name: Apoo
text: For a moment, he really was ready to kill him...

name: Apoo
text: What a beast.

name: Urouge
text: A second-in-command worth 120 million...

name: Urouge
text: He doesn't seem like the type who'd follow orders...

name: Urouge
text: I guess that's saying something about his captain, huh?

name: Zoro
text: Hey, where's the hospital?

name: Bonney
text: The hospital?

name: Zoro
text: I'll bring this guy there. He got shot.

name: Bonney
text: Just leave that stranger alone!

name: Bonney
text: I don't believe it.

name: Bonney
text: A pirate helping someone? Never heard of that before...

name: Sanji
text: I just had a look around town.

name: Sanji
text: People were flying around on these bubble-bikes!

name: Usopp
text: Oh, I saw it, I saw it! Those were cool, weren't they?

name: Usopp
text: Let's buy one!

name: Franky
text: We've gotta find out how they ride'em!

name: Sanji
text: Oh, maybe that's from Nami-san?

name: Sanji
text: Hi, Nami-swa-

name: Chopper
text: Hello?!

name: Chopper
text: It's me!

name: Chopper
text: It's Chopper!

name: Chopper
text: Um, there were so many different kinds of ice cream...

name: Chopper
text: We weren't paying attention!

name: Sanji
text: Hey, what are you so upset about?

name: Chopper
text: Sanji?!

name: Chopper
text: Something terrible just happened! What do we do?!

name: Sanji
text: You're not making any sense! Calm down and tell me what happened!

name: Usopp
text: What's up, Sanji?

name: Chopper
text: Camie has been kidnapped!

name: Sanji
text: What did you say?!

name: Chopper
text: It's probably that team of slave-traders who did it!

name: Chopper
text: I don't understand the reason,

name: Chopper
text: but mermen and fishmen get sold off at the market, regardless of whether they've actually done anything!

name: Chopper
text: They took Camie away!

name: Chopper
text: If she ends up being a slave for the rest of her life, it'll be our fault!

name: Chopper
text: There are so many human shops on the archipelago,\Nso we have no idea where they're taking her!

name: Chopper
text: And we don't even know who took her!

name: Chopper
text: The archipelago is too big, but if everyone lends a hand, then maybe...

name: Sanji
text: Tell me where you guys are right now.

name: Sanji
text: We'll meet up there.

name: Chopper
text: Huh? But...!

name: Sanji
text: We'll contact a guy who's a pro at this stuff.

name: Sanji
text: I'll call the Flying Fish Riders!

name: Duval
text: Yahoo! It's me, Handsome!

name: Duval
text: No, that's wrong!

name: Duval
text: It's Duval!

name: Riders
text: It's Duval!

name: Duval
text: Greetings, Master Black Leg!

name: Sanji
text: You're late, Flying Fish Riders!

name: Duval
text: Wait a minute, young master...

name: Duval
text: We are the Rosy Life Riders!

name: Sanji
text: I don't care what you call yourselves! You're annoying!

name: Sanji
text: Anyway, a mermaid was kidnapped. That's why we contacted you.

name: Duval
text: Huh? So the slave-traders showed up, huh?

name: Riders
text: Those guys are unBerryevable!

name: Usopp
text: Hey, weren't YOU slave-traders too?!

name: Franky
text: There are so many places they could have gone to, so...

name: Franky
text: You guys! Give us a hand!

name: Duval
text: Why, of course! Thank you for your orders!

name: Riders
text: Thank you very much!

name: Usopp
text: Will we really be alright with these guys?

name: Duval
text: But first, the Handsome me just went to a city where I could find some women.

name: SH
text: Huh?

name: Duval
text: As I expected, I...

name: Duval
text: couldn't get any...

name: Sanji
text: I might have restructured your face, but I can't restructure your heart, you know.

name: Duval
text: But don't mind that! I got it, young masters!

name: Duval
text: We just have to find that mermaid before she's sold, right?

name: Sanji
text: That's right. You guys should know a thing or two about the Sabaody Archipelago, right?

name: Duval
text: Of course!

name: Duval
text: We know the seas around here like our own backyard!

name: Duval
text: Just think of it as having gotten on a really big ship!

name: Rider
text: Now, get on!

name: Usopp
text: So we are going on this flying fish?

name: Rider
text: Yes, friend!

name: Franky
text: I'm counting on you!

name: Rider
text: Gotcha!

name: Sanji
text: So, how are we gonna look for them?

name: Duval
text: Young master, people in this business have their own way of doing things.

name: Duval
text: We already have information on the various slave-trader teams.

name: Duval
text: First of, we'll pick up the Straw Hats who are spread all over the Sabaody Archipelago!

name: Duval
text: And at the same time, we'll also track down the slave-traders who took that mermaid!

name: Duval
text: Let's get going, you guys!

name: Riders
text: Yeah!
{\fad(300,800)}Sabaody Park

name: Chopper
text: {\fad(0,500)}Is this really okay?

name: Chopper
text: Sanji, what do I do?

name: Sanji
text: Listen, Chopper! No matter what, don't move!

name: Sanji
text: We'll come get you no matter what!

name: Chopper
text: Got it...

name: Chopper
text: Hey, Luffy! Sanji said we should stay where we...

name: Chopper
text: In times like this, it's dangerous for us to get separated, right...

name: Chopper
text: Brook?

name: Chopper
text: You're too relaxed! I was really shocked!

name: Chopper
text: Camie was kidnapped, you know!

name: Chopper
text: If she gets sold, she'll end up being a slave for the rest of her life!

name: Brook
text: Chopper-san,...

name: Brook
text: Sanji-san was very specific as to what we should do next.

name: Brook
text: No matter how we spend it, we will still be waiting for a certain amount of time.

name: Chopper
text: I see.

name: Rider
text: Head, we've arrived at Sabaody Park!

name: Duval
text: Pick up each one of the Straw Hats, one by one!

name: Rider
text: Yeah!

name: Rider
text: The #5 public snail-phone should be somewhere around here.

name: Usopp
text: Yeah, it's here! There they are! Those two on that bench!

name: Usopp
text: Hey, you two!

name: Usopp
text: What the...?!

name: Usopp
text: Why are you so freaking relaxed?

name: Usopp
text: Let's go! We're initiating our great plan to save Camie!

name: Brook
text: Yes! It's time to give it our best! Let's go!

name: Chopper
text: We... we got yelled at, Brook!

name: Brook
text: Ashamed! I am slightly ashamed!

name: Duval
text: Split up and keep going! Investigate all of the slave-trading organizations.

name: Duval
text: Find out who did it! And don't forget to pick up the remaining Straw Hats!

name: Rider
text: Understood! We're splitting up!

name: Duval
text: Alright! Hurry up, Rosy-Life Riders!

name: Duval
text: There's not a minute to lose!

name: Duval
text: That should do it.

name: Sanji
text: That's not enough! Can't you do anything about this cow?!

name: Sanji
text: I should have gone on a flying fish too!

name: Duval
text: Huh? Did you just say that I'm handsome?

name: Sanji
text: I never said that! You're the damn Head, aren't you, Duval?!

name: Sanji
text: Why aren't you the fastest one in the team?!

name: Duval
text: What are you saying?

name: Duval
text: Of course I'm the most handsome one in the team!

name: Sanji
text: Just speed this thing up, you moron!

name: Duval
text: Alright, we're here!
{\fad(700,0)}Meanwhile\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\NGrove 22 Human Shop

name: Luffy
text: Are you sure nobody tried to sell you a mermaid here?

name: Slave-trader
text: I'm sure! Nobody has been here!

name: Hachi
text: Stop it, Straw Hat! If you cause a commotion, it'll just make it harder to look!

name: Luffy
text: Squid! Let's search the store!

name: Hachi
text: Alright.

name: Slave-trader
text: Hey!

name: Luffy
text: How'd it go, squid, Pappag?

name: Hachi
text: She's not here.

name: Pappag
text: Camie!

name: Hachi
text: Guess there's no helping it... Let's look somewhere else, Straw Hat.

name: Slave-trader
text: Well, wait a minute. It seems that we have one mermaid here after all.

name: Luffy
text: Really, there's a mermaid here?!

name: Slave-trader
text: The only mermaid we have here is this lady here, Marin!

name: Slave-trader
text: She's nice and cheap too. Want her?

name: FakeMermaid
text: Will you buy me, boy?

name: Luffy; Pappag; Hachi
text: You're not a mermaid!

name: Pappag
text: Wait, aren't you that guy we saw earlier?!

name: FakeMermaid
text: It's hard to breathe in water!

name: Luffy
text: Hey!

name: Pappag
text: Camie!

name: Luffy
text: Camie!

name: Pappag
text: Where are you?!

name: Hachi
text: We don't know if she's been sold yet... \NIf only we knew who took her, at least...

name: Pirate 1
text: Hey, look at that!

name: Pirate 2
text: That's Straw Hat Luffy from East Blue!

name: Pappag
text: Damn it! This is my fault!

name: Pappag
text: I knew that the amusement park is the best spot for the slave-traders...

name: Pappag
text: and how much they'd want to capture a mermaid...!

name: Luffy
text: Hey, these guys have so many types of ice-cream, huh? What do you guys want?

name: Pappag
text: Hey, let me pick one too!

name: Pappag
text: Camie, wait here for a minute.

name: Camie
text: Sure! Pick out a tasty one for me too.

name: Pappag
text: I don't want that to be my last conversation with Camie!

name: Pappag
text: {\fad(0,600)}It's my fault... It's because I let her go to the amusement park...!

name: Camie
text: Yes, because...

name: Camie
text: this has been my dream since I was a child...

name: Camie
text: This is the first time I've been to a place as high as this!

name: Camie
text: {\fad(0,350}I'll remember it for the rest of my life! Thank you!

name: Luffy
text: I'm not sure I understand, but she was so happy!

name: Luffy
text: It was fine to bring her to the amusement park, wasn't it?!

name: Pappag
text: No, it wasn't!

name: Pappag
text: Actually, mermen and fishmen shouldn't even be on this island in the first place.

name: Pappag
text: But...

name: Pappag
text: ...Hachi just wanted to help you guys out no matter what-

name: Hachi
text: Pappag! Don't say any more!

name: Luffy
text: What's he talking about? Why can't you guys be on this island?

name: Pappag
text: Camie and Hachi's enemies here aren't just the slave-traders.

name: Pappag
text: Every single human living on this archipelago is an enemy!

name: Nami
text: 200 years ago?
{\fad(500,0)}Grove 30\NShopping Mall

name: Robin
text: Yes. Until just 200 years ago, that dark history was reality...

name: Robin
text: Fishmen and mermen were considered normal fish,

name: Robin
text: and were discriminated by humans all over the world.

name: Robin
text: Everyone looked down upon them.

name: Nami
text: Those strong fishmen?

name: Robin
text: Even the strongest creatures are powerless when outnumbered.

name: Robin
text: This continued until the World Government decided to lend a helping hand to Fishman Island 200 years ago.

name: Robin
text: That's just another piece of the dark history of the human race.

name: Robin
text: On this archipelago, slave-trading and selling of human lives is still acceptable.

name: Robin
text: So I think, maybe the discrimination of mermen and fishmen is still common here, too.

name: Luffy
text: Discrimination?

name: Pappag
text: I'm the fool here for not remembering that this is one island to avoid...

name: Pappag
text: That's why I should have stopped Camie, no matter how cruel I'd have to be...

name: Nami
text: Then, could that be the reason why Hachi and Camie had to disguise themselves on this island?

name: Robin
text: I hope I'm just reading too much into things, though.

name: Franky
text: Bratty girl! Robin!

name: Robin
text: Franky!

name: Nami
text: Hey, stop calling me "bratty girl"!

name: Franky
text: Hurry up and get on the flying fish! That mermaid was kidnapped!

name: Robin
text: Camie-chan?!

name: Nami
text: Kidnapped?!

name: Pappag
text: Camie...!

name: Hachi
text: Sorry, Straw Hat... I just wanted to help, but I ended up causing you trouble...

name: Luffy
text: What're you guys saying?

name: Luffy
text: I never thought you did anything wrong!

name: Luffy
text: The three of you are my friends!

name: Luffy
text: No matter what might happen, we'll definitely save Camie!

name: Luffy
text: So stop crying!

name: Pappag
text: Straw...

name: Pappag
text: You...!

name: Riders
text: Straw Hat!

name: Hachi
text: It's the Flying Fish Riders!

name: Rider
text: We've been looking for ya... Get on!

name: Luffy
text: Hey, squid... Are you gonna fly too?

name: Hachi
text: Yeah!
{\fad(500,0)}Sabaody Archipelago - Grove 1
{\fad(500,0)}Human Auction House
{\fad(250,0}Back Door

name: Peterman
text: Be sure to get a good price for her!

name: Slave-trader
text: She'll definitely catch a high price! Come back for your share later!

name: Peterman
text: I'll look forward to it!

name: Slave-trader
text: Oh, my! Saint Roswald! Lady Sharlia! Welcome!

name: Slave-trader
text: I'm afraid that it will be hard for everyone to get on their knees while talking inside the hall...

name: Rosward
text: I do not mind. They may bid freely.

name: Slave-trader
text: Thank you very much! Well then, let me take you to the VIP seats.

name: Sharlia
text: Big Brother Charlos is so late...

name: Rosward
text: It is because he chose to ride on a lowly human.

name: Rosward
text: If he was going to ride, he should have used a fishman.

name: Rosward
text: They have 10 times the strength of a man, after all.

name: Kidd
text: Celestial Dragons... Slaves... The Human Shop...

name: Man
text: That's...

name: Man 2
text: Captain Kid, from South Blue!

name: Kidd
text: Compared to the "righteous" greed of the rulers,

name: Kidd
text: the villains of the world seem much more honorable.

name: Kidd
text: When scum rules the world, only more scum is born...

name: Kidd
text: You don't even understand that?

name: Kidd
text: At least we're honest about being bad people, right Killer?

name: Killer
text: You're right.

name: Kidd
text: How about we buy anyone who seems interesting?

name: Heat
text: Chief Kid, look at that.

name: Kidd
text: I know that face...

name: Heat
text: It's the 200-million man from North Blue, Trafalgar Law.

name: Heat
text: I heard some bad rumors about him.

name: Kidd
text: His manners are bad, too.
{\fad(300,700)}Auction Host\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\NWaiting Room

name: Slave-trader
text: Disco-san!

name: Slave-trader
text: We've got something incredible today!

name: Disco
text: Today's big draw is a giant, right? I already know.

name: Disco
text: Leave it to me. I'll be sure to get a good price for him.

name: Disco
text: Are the cherry blossoms prepared yet?

name: Slave-trader
text: Wrong! It's a mermaid! A young mermaid!

name: Slave-trader
text: I'm sure the bidding war will be fierce!

name: Disco
text: Really?

name: Camie
text: Let me go! That hurts!

name: Camie
text: No, Hacchin!

name: Slave-traders
text: Why, this one...! If you don't want to get hurt, then stay still!

name: Disco
text: Hey, don't be so rough with such an important item!

name: Slave-trader
text: Disco-san!

name: Disco
text: Oh, so this is the one? The mermaid that just came in...

name: Slave-trader
text: Yes.

name: Disco
text: How rare! She seems lively and healthy!

name: Disco
text: We should fetch quite the price for this one!

name: Disco
text: Who brought her here?

name: Slave-trader
text: The Hound Pets.

name: Disco
text: Peterman, huh? He's done a great job.

name: Disco
text: Doesn't seem like the Flying Fish Riders brought in anything this time, though.

name: Disco
text: Well, regardless, this one should bring in a lot of money.

name: Disco
text: What's with that face?!

name: Disco
text: Why you...!

name: Disco
text: You're just a damn fish! Know your place!

name: Slave-trader
text: Wait, Disco-san! She's an important item! If you hurt her, her value will drop!

name: Slave-trader
text: If you have to kick her then at least, do it somewhere where her clothes will cover it, like her stomach!

name: Camie
text: Hacchin will definitely come and beat you up!

name: Disco
text: She still has the nerve to talk back to me...

name: Disco
text: Hey! Give me the neck ring!

name: Slaver
text: Yes...

name: Disco
text: I'll put this on her.

name: Camie
text: No!

name: Slave-trader
text: Disco-san!

name: Slave-trader
text: Hey, what happened, Disco-san?!

name: Slave-trader
text: The show is just about to start, too!

name: Slave-trader
text: Doctor! Get a doctor!

name: Prisoner
text: Hey, gramps!

name: Prisoner
text: Quit pretending.

name: Prisoner
text: That was you, right? That "Haki" just now.

name: Prisoner
text: Who the hell are you?

name: Rayleigh
text: Just an old man who coats ships.
{\fad(300,1100)}Former first mate of the\N\N\N\N\N\N\NRoger Pirates

name: Rayleigh
text: {\an8}I simply

name: Rayleigh
text: {\an8}love
{\fad(300,0)}"The right hand of the Pirate King"\N\N\N\N\N\N\NSilvers Rayleigh

name: Rayleigh
text: {\an8}young girls.
